headline: Companies positioned to share $200M Wright-Patterson research contact
summary: Apr. 17—Local defense contractors are positioned to win million in a massive new research and development contract from the Air Force Research Laboratory at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base. Arctos Technology Solutions LLC, of Beavercreek; the University of Dayton Research Institute; Booz Allen Hamilton Inc., of McLean, Va.; Northrop Grumman Aeronautic Systems and Lockheed Martin Aeronautics ...
